ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cargo_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cargo category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the cargo category (e.g., REEFER, NOR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cargo category */,
  "is_reefer" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is reefer (refrigerated) or not */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the cargo (e.g., tons, kilograms, pounds) */,
  "dimension_requirements" TEXT /* Dimension requirements for the cargo (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailing schedule */,
  "cargo_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cargo category for the shipment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sailing (GMT) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sailing (GMT) */,
  "por_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the port of origin city */,
  "fnd_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the final destination city */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel used for the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., planned, in transit, completed) */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the vessel */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the vessel */,
  "estimated_journey_time" REAL /* Estimated journey time of the vessel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_cargo_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("cargo_category_id") REFERENCES cargo_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_fnd_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("fnd_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_por_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("por_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the port is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the port */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the city is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of the vessel (e.g., container ship, bulk carrier) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the vessel in TEUs (Twenty-foot Equivalent Units) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the vessel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the vessel */,
  "imo_number" TEXT /* International Maritime Organization (IMO) number of the vessel */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the vessel was built */,
  "gross_tonnage" REAL /* Gross tonnage of the vessel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cargo_shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cargo shipment */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailing schedule for the shipment */,
  "cargo_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cargo category */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the cargo */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the cargo in tons */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., loaded, in transit, delivered) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "container_number" TEXT /* Container number for the shipment */,
  "seal_number" TEXT /* Seal number for the shipment */,
  "bill_of_lading" TEXT /* Bill of lading number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_shipments_cargo_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("cargo_category_id") REFERENCES cargo_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_shipments_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., logistics manager, port authority) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailing schedule being accessed */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cargo shipment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES cargo_shipments ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cargo_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking event */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cargo shipment being tracked */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the cargo */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the current location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the current location */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the cargo (e.g., en route, at port, delivered) */,
  "tracking_date" TEXT /* Date of the tracking event */,
  "tracking_time" TEXT /* Time of the tracking event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_tracking_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES cargo_shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cargo_inspection" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection record */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cargo shipment being inspected */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or remarks from the inspection */,
  "defect_found" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a defect was found during the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_inspection_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_inspection_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES cargo_shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazmat" (
  "hazmat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazmat record */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cargo shipment containing the hazmat */,
  "hazmat_description" TEXT /* Description of the hazmat material */,
  "hazmat_class" TEXT /* Class of the hazmat material (e.g., flammable, explosive) */,
  "hazmat_packaging" TEXT /* Packaging information for the hazmat material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hazmat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hazmat_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES cargo_shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_lines" (
  "shipping_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping line */,
  "shipping_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping line */,
  "shipping_line_address" TEXT /* Address of the shipping line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freight_forwarders" (
  "freight_forwarder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freight forwarder */,
  "freight_forwarder_name" TEXT /* Name of the freight forwarder */,
  "freight_forwarder_address" TEXT /* Address of the freight forwarder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freight_forwarder_id")
)
